name: Maharaja Veg Burger
description: Double decker vegetable patty layered with fresh lettuce, molten cheese, and our signature spicy tandoori sauce.

name: Spicy Paneer Tikka Burger
description: Succulent paneer tikka cubes marinated in Indian spices, grilled and topped with mint chutney and onions.

name: Classic Chicken Cheese Burger
description: Juicy flame-grilled chicken patty served with a thick slice of cheddar cheese and garden fresh tomatoes.

name: Peri Peri Crispy Chicken Burger
description: Zesty peri-peri breaded chicken breast fried to perfection, served with spicy mayo and crunchy gherkins.

name: Aloo Tikki Supreme Burger
description: Crispy golden potato patty infused with ginger and garlic, served with tangy tamarind sauce and onions.

name: Mutton Galouti Burger
description: Melt-in-your-mouth minced mutton patty prepared with traditional Awadhi spices, served in a toasted brioche bun.

name: Tandoori Mushroom Burger
description: Earthy portobello mushrooms marinated in yogurt and tandoori masala, char-grilled for a smoky authentic flavor.

name: Cheese Lava Veg Burger
description: A liquid cheese core within a crunchy vegetable patty that oozes out with every single bite.

name: Paneer Butter Masala Fusion Burger
description: Grilled paneer steak smothered in a rich, creamy tomato gravy and topped with butter-sauteed bell peppers.

name: Crispy Fish Fillet Burger
description: Premium batter-fried fish fillet served with creamy tartar sauce and crisp iceberg lettuce in soft buns.

name: Mexican Jalapeno Veg Burger
description: Spicy vegetable patty topped with pickled jalapenos, chunky salsa, and a spicy Mexican bean spread.

name: BBQ Chicken Smokehouse Burger
description: Hickory-smoked chicken patty drenched in sweet BBQ sauce, topped with caramelized onions and fried onion rings.

name: Zesty Lemon Herb Paneer Burger
description: Lightly grilled paneer seasoned with citrus zest and fresh herbs, served with a cooling mint mayo.

name: Lucknowi Mutton Shami Burger
description: Delicate mutton shami kebab patty served with sliced red onions and a drizzle of coriander chutney.

name: Garden Veggie Delight Burger
description: Wholesome patty made of fresh peas, carrots, and beans, topped with cucumber slices and thousand island.

name: Spicy Schezwan Chicken Burger
description: Fried chicken patty tossed in fiery Indo-Chinese Schezwan sauce, topped with spring onions and crunchy cabbage.

name: Cheese Melt Mushroom Burger
description: Sauteed wild mushrooms smothered in melted mozzarella cheese and served with garlic aioli on toasted buns.

name: Teriyaki Glazed Chicken Burger
description: Grilled chicken breast basted with sweet teriyaki glaze, served with grilled pineapple and fresh slaw topping.

name: Grilled Soya Chaap Burger
description: Protein-rich soya chaap marinated in pickling spices, grilled and served with onion rings and lemon mayo.

name: Egg Benedict Breakfast Burger
description: Soft poached egg served on a grilled chicken patty with hollandaise sauce and fresh baby spinach.
